title: Perception and Sensor Systems
shortSummary: A robotics specialization on visual perception, sensor fusion, calibration, and failure handling in the physical world.
whyItMatters: Tesla- and SpaceX-style AI roles live at the boundary between models, sensors, and hardware. This module introduces the perception layer behind those systems.
coreConcepts: Camera, lidar, radar, and sensor-fusion basics
Perception failure modes in real-world environments
Latency and compute constraints on physical systems
